# Bridgeberg

> I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.

## Pages

- [About](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/about/): Christian Broberg — 30+ years of web development, software architecture, and AI-native building.
- [AI-Assisted Code Review: What Works and What Doesn't — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/ai-assisted-code-review/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [AI-Native Development: How I Build Software in 2026](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/ai-native-development/): Claude Code is not autocomplete. It's an architectural partner. Here's how I structure every project for AI-first development.
- [Building a CMS from Scratch in 2026](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/building-cms-from-scratch/): After 30 years of working with every CMS from Drupal to WordPress to custom solutions, I decided to build my own. Here's why.
- [Building Type-Safe APIs with tRPC and Zod — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/building-type-safe-apis/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [A Decade Building an IoT Platform](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/decade-building-iot-platform/): Reflections on 10 years as Chief Software Architect at Senti.Cloud — from sensor protocols to time-series databases to the lessons that carry forward.
- [Designing Developer Tools That People Actually Use — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/designing-developer-tools/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [From 1,000 Websites to AI-Native: 30 Years of Evolution](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/from-1000-websites-to-ai/): A personal reflection on three decades of building for the web — from hand-coded HTML in 1995 to AI-native development in 2025.
- [Blog](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/): Articles about AI-native development, web architecture, CMS design, and lessons from 30 years of building software.
- [Kubernetes Secrets Management Done Right — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/kubernetes-secrets-management/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [MCP Servers: Teaching AI to Manage DNS](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/mcp-servers-dns-management/): Building a Model Context Protocol server that lets Claude manage DNS zones directly. Infrastructure as conversation.
- [Monorepo Architecture with pnpm and Turborepo](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/monorepo-architecture-pnpm-turbo/): How I structure multi-package TypeScript projects with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo — and why it's worth the initial complexity.
- [Rust for Node.js Developers: A Practical Guide — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/rust-for-node-developers/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [Zero Trust Architecture for Small Teams — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/blog/zero-trust-architecture/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [Home — Bridgeberg](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/): I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
- [Projects](https://bridgeberg.webhouse.app/projects/): Open source tools, internal platforms, and AI-native systems built by Christian Broberg and WebHouse.
